ImageDescription.value: The Melbourne Grand Prix Circuit around Albert Park Lake, located a few kilometres south of central Melbourne and home to the Australian Grand Prix. This picture was taken by a Planet Labs SkySat satellite on Christmas Eve, 2017, when the course was not in use.
